readingLevel: 6th grade average, 8th grade max for legal boundary copy
ctaPolicy: Every useful page may include honest, relevant CTAs. Index status does not suppress selling.
productMediaPolicy: Product images must be designed and styled to fit assigned containers without cropping important text, logos, or document edges.
navigationPolicy: Primary nav should focus on Products, Letter Studio, Pricing, Resources, and a pricing CTA. Use cases belong in a visible secondary intent rail with direct links to DIY credit letters, explanation letters, apartment readiness, income/job proof, loan readiness, business funding, life-admin paperwork, and the full bundle. Do not use Start Here $0 in the primary nav.
homepagePositioningPolicy: Homepage hero should lead with self-service credit repair letters, approval-ready direct-download document kits, price/value clarity, and optional $0 drafting. Do not lead the hero with negative no-credit-repair warning copy.
copyPolicy: Copy must be fuller than generic utility text: explain the situation, deliverable, preparation steps, next action, and self-service boundary.
